title: Reddit Virality Study
description: Leader and principal programmer of a team of six students collaborating on a school project designed to identify trends in the lifespans of text-based memes online. Found significant results and created an accessible video presentation as a deliverable.

title: MTG Deck Builder
description: Solo developer on a WIP Magic: The Gathering deck builder application for organizing and creating new decks. Implemented using Tkinter and pandas, drawing its data from the official Magic: The Gathering API.

title: League Pick2Win
description: Lead project designer and programmer in a team of two, exploring a real-world League of Legends dataset to using character selection to predict game outcomes, implemented using pandas and scikit-learn.

description.title: ER Enemy Type Randomizer
description.description: Personal tool built for Elden Ring Enemy Randomizer. Default behavior is to have each enemy individually randomized, but does not have easy functionality for changing each type of enemy to another type. This project helped remedy this, which led to each area still feeling unique instead of pulling from the same enemy pool the entire game.

description.title: Dead Soundscape
description.description: Audio project for MUS 7 creating a soundscape incorporating sounds from around the Eucalyptus Grove, a manmade natural space that is much more designed and suited for human life than animal or plant life.
